title: Twin Pack Large Microfibre Glass Cleaning Cloths – Streak-Free, Lint-Free, Durable 40x48cm – Car Window Cleaner, Glasses Cleaner, Machine Washable, Perfect for Glass & Detailing
features: Premium Microfibre Cloths for Glass – Ultra-soft, streak-free, and lint-free glass cleaning cloths designed for crystal-clear results on car windows, mirrors, and spectacles.
Twin Pack Large 40x48cm Cloths – Two large microfibre cleaning cloths in each pack, perfect for window cleaning, car detailing, and household glass surfaces.
Perfect for Car Cleaning – These car microfibre cloths are ideal for use as a car window cleaner or for general car cleaning products, providing a spotless finish without streaks.
Durable & Machine Washable – Built to last, these microfiber cloths can withstand repeated washes while maintaining their cleaning effectiveness for car windows and glass.
Versatile Glass & Polishing Cloths – Use as a glass cleaner cloth, mirror cleaner, silver polishing cloth, or for any glass cleaning task. Handy for removing glasses cleaners or polishes.
Streak-Free for Multiple Uses – Ideal for cleaning glasses, windows, and screens, these microfibre cloths are lint-free and perfect as a window cleaning cloth or a glasses cleaning cloth.
